# Index

*Generated by `software/tools/build_index.py` from the [Glossary](Glossary.md) term list — do not edit by hand. Regenerating this file should produce no diff (INV-4); if it doesn't, the index was stale.*

*Each term lists the sections that **define or rule on** it — the sections it is about — not every passing mention.*
